leadText: The Shrouded Ruins (Japanese: 霧の遺跡 Foggy Ruins) is an area located in the northern region of the Crimson Mirelands of Hisui. It is located east of Cloudpool Ridge and the Brava Arena, north of Diamond Heath, and northwest of Lake Valor. In the climax of the story, this is the setting where Red Chain is forged with the help of the lake guardians. The Shrouded Ruins also plays a role in Request 22: "Eerie Apparitions in the Night", being the place where Spiritomb first appear once the player collects all the wisps scattered across the Hisui region.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The Odd Keystone structure at the Shrouded Ruins Ruined stone pillars and archways comprise the Shrouded Ruins, similar to the Celestica Ruins of the Coronet Highlands . Many of the original pillars still stand in place. In the areas surrounding the ruins stand crude formations of stacked stones, piled to various heights and dimensions. A stone tablet at the center of the ruins depicts ancient drawings of various Pokémon, including a few of the noble Pokémon of the region, Legendary Pokémon , and Arceus . A stone structure that resembles a gigantic Odd Keystone lies to the east of the main ruins.
